tools.name: bsi_get_scoreboard
tools.description: Get today's college baseball scores and game results. Returns live and final games with team names, scores, venue, and game status. Covers every NCAA Division I program.

tools.name: bsi_get_standings
tools.description: Get current college baseball conference standings including wins, losses, win percentage, runs scored, runs allowed, run differential, streak, and games back.

tools.name: bsi_get_rankings
tools.description: Get the latest national college baseball rankings (Top 25). Returns rank, team, record, and trend.

tools.name: bsi_get_team_sabermetrics
tools.description: Get advanced sabermetric batting and pitching metrics for a college baseball team: wOBA, wRC+, FIP, ERA-, BABIP, ISO, and more.

tools.name: bsi_get_leaderboard
tools.description: Get the top college baseball hitters or pitchers by an advanced metric. Returns a ranked leaderboard with player names, teams, and stat values.

tools.name: bsi_get_conference_power_index
tools.description: Get a naive Conference Power Index — D1 conferences ranked by win% plus a run-differential adjustment, computed from standings (single-team and zero-game conferences excluded). NOT strength-of-schedule weighted; read it as a rough sort, not an authoritative power ranking. Uses Highlightly standings

tools.name: bsi_get_player_stats
tools.description: Search for a college baseball player by name and get their stats, position, team, and headshot. Searches BSI sabermetric data.

tools.name: bsi_get_team_schedule
tools.description: Get the full schedule for a college baseball team, including past results and upcoming games.

tools.name: bsi_get_match_detail
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific college baseball game including venue, weather, win predictions, play-by-play, and team stats. Use a match ID from the scoreboard.

tools.name: bsi_search_intel
tools.description: Search the open web for college-baseball news, scouting reports, beat-writer coverage, and analytical commentary. Complements the stats tools — use this when a question needs narrative context, not just numbers. Defaults to trusted college-baseball domains (d1baseball.com, baseballamerica.com, ESPN,

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "bsi_search_intel" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
